TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carlos Boozer siwkay niza nalecuhan i Aschaffenburg, West Germany, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Carlos Boozer i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Cleveland Cavaliers putiput. tatama, lumeniay a banges, u West Germany kanatal a tademaw. nalecuhan i 11 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1981 a mihca, Carlos Boozer, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶arr~…ĺos booz…ôr siwkaj niza nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i as ¶ńßaff…ônburg, w…ôst g…ôrmanj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶arr~…ĺos booz…ôr i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu ¶r~…ĺ…ô*…ôr~…ĺand ¶a*ar~…ĺi…ôrs putiput. tatama, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a baŇč…ôs, u w…ôst g…ôrmanj kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, ¶arr~…ĺos booz…ôr, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Carlos Boozer siwkay niza nalecuhan i Aschaffenburg, West Germany, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Carlos Boozer i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Cleveland Cavaliers putiput. tatama, lumeniay a banges, u West Germany kanatal a tademaw. nalecuhan i 11 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1981 a mihca, Carlos Boozer, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶arr~…ĺos booz…ôr siwkaj niza nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i as ¶ńßaff…ônburg, w…ôst g…ôrmanj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶arr~…ĺos booz…ôr i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu ¶r~…ĺ…ô*…ôr~…ĺand ¶a*ar~…ĺi…ôrs putiput. tatama, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a baŇč…ôs, u w…ôst g…ôrmanj kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, ¶arr~…ĺos booz…ôr, miunduaj.
